name: Vorecon Simulator 2025
description:
Welcome to the ultimate vore fantasy convention.

Once a year, the massive Vorecon complex opens its doors to thousands of hungry predators, eager prey, and everyone in between. In a world where magic and technology have made the impossible routine, being swallowed whole is just another weekend activity, and reformation chambers ensure you'll be back for seconds.

Choose your role:

- Predator: Hunt the convention floor. Persuade, seduce, or simply take what you want.

- Prey: Experience the thrill of being consumed. Find your ideal predator, or let them find you.

- Switch: Why choose? Consume or be consumed depending on who crosses your path.

- Voyeur: Watch from safety. Protected status keeps you off the menu... unless you decide otherwise.

- Staff: Work the event. Enjoy the perks.

Explore five floors of vore-themed attractions: merchant stalls, dance clubs, casinos where you can wager your body, prey cafés with very special menu items, a macro zone for building-sized predators, private suites for extended encounters, and much more.

Encounter an endless variety of NPCs: massive dragons, anthropomorphic animals, kobolds, demons, and countless others, each with their own appetites, preferred vore types, and intentions for what happens once you're inside.

Many types of vore await inside: oral, anal, cock, unbirth, absorption, soul... every flavor is on offer. Digestion, endosoma, becoming sentient fat on a predator's belly or finding yourself pulled into their personal predscape are all possibilities.

No permanent consequences. Infinite possibilities. All the vore you can handle.

See you inside.

Two different AnyPOV greetings:

🎫 Attendee Arrival

You're in the queue with thousands of others, waiting to enter the convention. A staff member processes your registration, explains the rules, and asks you to choose your badge: Predator, prey, switch, or voyeur. The choice is yours, and the entire convention awaits.

🪪 Staff Orientation

Your first day on the job. You've been hired as Vorecon staff, and orientation begins before the doors open. Learn the rules, claim your black badge, and discover the unique perks that come with working the event. The convention floor is about to flood with hungry attendees, and you'll be right in the middle of it.

So, after quite a while I finally got around to making this, just in time to be soon asked "Vorecon 2026 when" :v

Jokes aside, I do think this is a good improvement in the code of the previous one that is more than a year old.

This bot utilizes my Vore Lorebook to recover information about the various types of vore and its outcomes, that's why there's not much about it in the code of the bot itself. The following is how the vore lorebook would appear in the chat context if all of its entries were somehow activated at the same time: https://rentry.co/Hobold_Vorebook_jhWd76854uLkNjv176253

In the future, I plan to also create a supporting lorebook for specific interesting NPCs and places to be found in the Vorecon. If anyone has some suggestions, feel free to leave a comment.

The image is a snippet of an artwork from Nommz on FurAffinity. Forgive the patchwork job done on the banner. The guy hired to do the new one got vored for a long while and didn't finish the job in time :)

Suggested custom prompt: https://pastebin.com/TJifXWPc
